blockers.title: Conflict resolution can permanently archive suppressed-minor or claimed rows sharing the original email
blockers.evidence: In convex/admin/claims.ts:185-206, resolveConflictAsClaimed builds otherLiveAtOriginal as every importedMembers row at the original email whose state is not archived_conflict, then patches each to claim_state=archived_conflict. That includes suppressed_minor, unclaimed, claim_in_progress, or claimed rows, not just the other conflict row of a duplicate-email pair. This violates the spec's minor safeguard that suppressed_minor rows are read-only and clear only by age-up, and can permanently remove a minor from the age-up claim path.
blockers.required_fix: Only auto-archive rows that are explicitly in claim_state='conflict' and are part of the duplicate conflict being resolved. If any other live state shares the email, refuse the release with a neutral error and leave all rows unchanged. Add regression tests for suppressed_minor and claimed rows at the original email.

non_blocking_notes: Could not run vitest in this read-only review environment: Vite tried to write node_modules/.vite-temp/vitest.config.ts.timestamp-*.mjs and failed with EPERM.
No added em dash/en dash was found in the diff-added lines.

spec_compliance.criterion: Admin identity check server-side on admin queries/mutations
spec_compliance.evidence: Admin queue queries/mutations call requireSuperAdmin or requireSuperAdminInAction before data access; amISuperAdmin is a non-authorizing UI courtesy.
resolveConflictAsClaimed can mutate suppressed_minor rows to archived_conflict when they share the original email, preventing the documented automatic age-up clearing path.
applyPipelineDecision requires standard lane, active lifecycle, and latest true pipeline consent before approval.

spec_compliance.criterion: Guardian consent cannot be confirmed by admin panel
spec_compliance.evidence: Admin guardian surface exposes only resendGuardianEmailFromPanel; confirmation remains in confirmGuardianConsent token flow.

spec_compliance.criterion: Data request submission creates only an inert record
spec_compliance.evidence: submitDataRequest and submitMyDataRequest insert dataRequests rows and do not mutate member rows.

spec_compliance.criterion: Brand locks for added member-facing strings
spec_compliance.evidence: Diff-added lines contain no em dash/en dash; added copy is plain-language and no gold token usage appears in the admin/member data UI.

summary: The slice is close, but the claim-conflict release mutation has a real data-safety bug around shared-email rows. It can silently convert a suppressed minor's row into a permanent archived conflict, which breaks the vault's under-18 age-up safeguard.
